videos.title: Granfondo Pinarello 2018
videos.description: Rivivi le emozioni della Granfondo Pinarello disputatasi il 15 luglio 2018. Istanti e sensazioni provate affrontando le salite della nostra provincia, tra le quali non potrai dimenticare l'ormai leggendario “MURO DI CA’ DEL POGGIO” teatro di grandi sfide ciclistiche.

videos.title: Elite RealVideo DVDs Granfondo Pinarello preview
videos.description: Granfondo Pinarello introduces us to some fascinating landscapes around Treviso, dedicated to those who love to ride where nature's richer. Race starts in Treviso's city centre, then right away you're facing the mesmerising Collalto Castle climb, then on to Combai in the Prosecco hills and finally the classic Montello Presa XIII, an unmissable challenge for a cyclist: a 4-km uphill climb that gets to 12% slope in some areas, an effort well repaid by the beautiful scenery. Thousands of cyclists from all over the world compete each year in the Pina Cycling Marathon.
